message:
fix(e2e): comprehensive kc-agent-setup-dismissed + spec fixes (#10851)

* fix(e2e): add kc-agent-setup-dismissed to all mission and liveMock setups

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(e2e): fix remaining test failures across 11 spec files

- Add kc-agent-setup-dismissed to all localStorage setups missing it
  (Clusters, Dashboard, ResolutionMemory, console-error-scan,
  dashboard-health, mission-deeplink, navigation-error-regression,
  NamespaceOverview, UpdateSettings)
- GPUOverview: navigate to /gpu-reservations instead of /compute
  (gpu_overview card only exists on gpu-reservations dashboard)
- UpdateSettings: add retry pattern for failed banner WS race
- NamespaceOverview: add kc-has-session/kc-backend-status to both
  demo and live mode setups
- cost-deep: use xpath ancestor to find stat block container
  instead of fragile single-parent traversal

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(e2e): add kc-agent-setup-dismissed to all remaining spec files

Comprehensive sweep: every spec file with inline localStorage setup
now includes kc-agent-setup-dismissed to prevent the AgentSetupDialog
modal from blocking pointer events during tests.

Files updated: AIMode, ClusterResourceTree, Events, Login,
ResourceUsage, Settings, cluster-admin-cards, deploy-dashboard,
hourglass-audit, hourglass-quick, mission-control-dry-run,
mission-control-kind-e2e, mission-import, liveMocks setupAuth, utils

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(e2e): add kc-agent-setup-dismissed to final 12 spec files

Complete coverage: every E2E spec now sets kc-agent-setup-dismissed
in localStorage to prevent the AgentSetupDialog modal overlay from
blocking pointer events.

Files: Sidebar, Tour, ai-ml-dashboard, benchmark-dashboard,
card-cache-compliance, card-loading-compliance, custom-dashboard,
mission-share, navbar-responsive, react-commits-idle,
react-commits, scan-progress

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
